/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/Beatmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/DebugOverlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/ParticleSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/Settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/Skins.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/miniz.c.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/sqlite3.c.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/Hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lonkstalk.dir/Database.cpp.o -o Lonkstalk  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_image.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_mixer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_ttf.so -lpthread -ldl
